creator: ebay@looksharp.net
text: Sorry, the fix does not seem to work for ZFS. I verified root_rw_mount seems to be set to YES but the root filesystem still gets mounted as r/o. I tested with ZFS on r318855 and ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/11.1/FreeBSD-11.1-PRERELEASE-amd64-20170519-r318507-disc1.iso.xz. UFS appears to work though.
